introduction: Senior Software Engineer and Tech Lead with 6+ years of experience building and scaling backend and distributed systems at Oracle, Google, and Amazon. Experienced in leading 10+ engineers across 3+ products, architecting 10+ microservices, and collaborating with 25+ cross-functional teams. Certified Bar Raiser at Oracle with expertise in cloud-native systems across healthcare, search, and finance. Strong in Java, Python, OCI, AWS, distributed and asynchronous systems, machine learning, generative AI, and developer-productivity tooling.
